commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps `MatrixAuthedHttpClient.requestJson` JSON parsing in a Matrix-specific malformed-JSON error with `statusCode` and adds a mocked unit test for that path.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +29. Total +36 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main directly calls `JSON.parse(text)` for Matrix JSON success responses, so a malformed `application/json` body can reproduce the parse failure through `MatrixAuthedHttpClient.requestJson`. I did not run a live homeserver repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor real-behavior proof plus normal CI/maintainer review, not a narrow automation-repairable code defect.

target.title: fix(matrix): guard JSON.parse against malformed homeserver response bodies
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

`extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.ts:55` calls `JSON.parse(text)` on the Matrix homeserver response body without try/catch. If the homeserver returns `Content-Type: application/json` with malformed body (e.g. proxy error, misconfigured reverse proxy, gateway HTML), the unhandled `SyntaxError` propagates to the caller instead of being caught.

This is **D4** defense-in-depth: crash → graceful error.

## Changes

- `extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.ts`: wrap `JSON.parse(text)` in try/catch; throw `Error("malformed JSON")` with `statusCode` attached (matching the `buildHttpError` convention)
- `extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.test.ts`: 1 new test verifying malformed JSON → Error with descriptive message

**Scope**: `MatrixAuthedHttpClient.requestJson` success-path JSON parse only (1 line). Empty-body and non-JSON-content-type paths already handled.

Label: bugfix | merge-risk: 🟢 minimal | AI-assisted

## Evidence

### Unit test — exercises actual changed code path via performMatrixRequest mock

The test mocks `performMatrixRequest` (the transport layer) to return malformed JSON, then calls `client.requestJson()` — the exact changed entry point:

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/matrix/src/matrix/sdk/http-client.test.ts

 ✓ MatrixAuthedHttpClient > parses JSON responses and forwards absolute-endpoint opt-in
 ✓ MatrixAuthedHttpClient > returns plain text when response is not JSON
 ✓ MatrixAuthedHttpClient > returns raw buffers for media requests
 ✓ MatrixAuthedHttpClient > raises HTTP errors with status code metadata
 ✓ MatrixAuthedHttpClient > throws descriptive error on malformed JSON success response

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  5 passed (5)
```

### Before/after

```
// Before: unhandled SyntaxError
return JSON.parse(text);  // 💥 SyntaxError → caller crash

// After: graceful error with statusCode
try {
  return JSON.parse(text);
} catch {
  throw Object.assign(
    new Error("Matrix homeserver returned malformed JSON"),
    { statusCode: response.status },  // preserved for caller context
  );
}
```
target.author: lsr911
